mapper.select: SELECT count(*) as count FROM sys01_user WHERE 1=1
SELECT sys01_user_id as sys01UserId , sys01_user_nm as sys01UserNm , sys01_pwd as sys01Pwd , sys01_tel as sys01Tel , sys01_email as sys01Email FROM sys01_user WHERE 1=1

SELECT sys01_user_id as sys01UserId , sys01_user_nm as sys01UserNm , sys01_pwd as sys01Pwd , sys01_tel as sys01Tel , sys01_email as sys01Email FROM sys01_user WHERE 1=1 AND sys01_user_id = #{sys01UserId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys01_user ( sys01_user_id, sys01_user_nm, sys01_pwd, sys01_tel, sys01_email ) VALUES ( #{sys01UserId}, #{sys01UserNm}, #{sys01Pwd}, #{sys01Tel}, #{sys01Email} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys02_dict WHERE 1=1 AND sys02_dict_id = #{sys02DictId}
